fact: OpenAlgo repo at github.com/marketcalls/openalgo is the execution backbone dependency
DhanHQ-py at github.com/dhan-oss/DhanHQ-py is the Dhan broker SDK
ShettyBot V1 at github.com/RohannShetty/ShettyBot_V1_Core provides intelligence layer
FinceptTerminal at github.com/Fincept-Corporation/FinceptTerminal is multi-asset terminal reference
